lineItems.description: Installation of Turf | +/- 1200 LBS | 4 Staffers - Manual move from dock, lay, seam alignment, gaff.

paymentTerms: 50% deposit due on acceptance via PayPal invoice. Balance net 15 from event end date. Late balance subject to 1.5%/mo finance charge. Cancellations within 7 days of event subject to 50% retention of total.

deliverables.title: Layered acrylic star bursts — 8-point cutouts
deliverables.dimensions: 16" each 3–4 stacked layers per star (1/4" cast acrylic each) Layer step: 20% smaller per layer, rotated 22.5° between layers 13 stars total — 4 on beam top edge, 3 on beam bottom edge, 2 on each outer leg edge, 1 on each inner leg edge
deliverables.notes: 1/4" cast acrylic (back layer biggest, front layer smallest). Layers bonded with edge-grade adhesive; magnetic mounting on rear plate. Stars mount so their centers sit ON the foam panel edge — half-overhanging the frame for sculptural shadow play. Asymmetric placement is intentional — palette/color rhythm distributed by hand, not gridded.
